title: Q&A of Promotion Alliance
bodyHtml:
Q1: What happens to my withdrawable rewards from the old version?
A：Rest assured, all withdrawable rewards from the old version have been automatically transferred to the new "Settle Bonus". Your withdrawal privileges remain unchanged and available at any time.
 
 
Q2: How will unsettled bonus from the old version be handled?
A：Historical unsettled bonus will be calculated based on historical rules, while new payments for orders and shipping fee will follow the new rules.
 
 
Q3: Why do I still see the old version interface?
A：PC Users: Refresh the page 2-3 times and clear browser cache.
App Users: Restart the App and update to the latest version (recommended).
We've optimized the affiliate program entry in the new version.
 
 
Q4: Why was my promotion tier downgraded?
A：While tier criteria have been adjusted in the new version, please note:
✅ Earnings Protection: Tier changes don't reduce existing benefits, plus new "First-order Bonus +$5";
✅ Growth Opportunities: Higher shipping commission rates with tier upgrades;
✅ Future Expansion: Higher tiers and commission rates will be introduced soon.
 
 
Q5: Why do I see order amounts but no first-order bonus?
A：The first-order bonus ONLY applies to new users invited after the new version launch. Historical orders are excluded from this benefit.
 
 
Q6: Why did my Unsettled Bonus decrease?
A：This occurs when invited users cancel paid orders/packages, making associated commissions invalid. Check the "Unsettled Bonus Details" page for specific transaction records.
 
 
Q7: Why did my Total Order Users count drop?
A：Consistent with Q6 reasons: Order cancellations by invited users invalidate related data. Verify specifics in your "Data Details" page.
 
Q8: Why can't I withdraw when Settle Bonus >0?
A：To ensure security, we limit withdrawals to 2 times per month. If exceeded, the function will lock and reset at 00:00 on the 1st of each month. Plan your withdrawals accordingly.
 
 
Q9: Why is the Total Order Users count inconsistent with the user count displayed in the list below?
A：This discrepancy arises because the bonus calculation rules in the previous version of the Promotion Alliance differed from the current version. Due to certain gameplay mechanisms, bonuses from subsequent payments (orders or shipping documents) made by some newly invited registered users were not credited to the inviter. However, with the launch of the new version, this issue has been resolved. All bonuses from orders and shipping payments made by users you invited will now be credited to your account.
 
 
Q10：Why does my "Order Users This Month" count seem lower?
A：This is because the Promotion Alliance rules in the old version did not account for first-order users, making it impossible to retrieve historical data. As a result, only the number of first-order users after the launch of the new version is counted here.

title: Process duration for each stages
bodyHtml:
Verify & Purchase time:

Beijing time 09:00-18:00 submitted order, we will deal with it within 6 hours to complete;

Beijing time 19:00-08:00 submitted order, we will be processed before 2 PM the next day;

Note: except for cannot contact the seller or abnormal orders

 

The sellers’ delivery time: Generally Chinese domestic Taobao sellers will send out the delivery within 3~7 days (except for part of the customized products and pre-order items)

 

Jingdong, Amazon self-running logistics will deliver items on the same day of purchasing (not self-running, franchised merchants send out delivery within 3-5 days)

The actual duration depends on the seller

 

The Chinese domestic delivery time to OOPBUY warehouse:

(OOPBUY warehouse is located in Huizhou, Guangdong)

For sellers located in Guangdong province- normally your order will arrive at our warehouse within 1-2days.

other provinces, around 3-5 days.

title: Purchase Agent Guide
Instructions for the Parcel Rehearsal Function
bodyHtml:
I. Key Advantages

There is no need to pay an estimated international shipping fee in advance. By using Parcel Rehearsal, you can obtain the exact final international shipping cost (provided that the shipping route, packing method, and packing details remain unchanged).

Once the rehearsal is completed and the parcel is submitted, as long as the required fees are paid and the order is not canceled, the parcel can be dispatched within 24 hours (excluding certain holidays).

II. Operation Process

    1. Submit a Parcel Rehearsal

        Go to “Personal Center – Warehouse”, select sub-orders with the status “Available for Parcel Creation”, then click “Rehearsal” and submit.

       

    2. Information Selection and Payment

        You need to select the recipient information, packing method, packing details, and shipping route in sequence (if no shipping route is available, you may submit the parcel rehearsal without selecting a route).

After completing these selections and paying the ¥20 rehearsal service fee, the parcel rehearsal will be successfully submitted, and our warehouse staff will begin processing your request promptly.

    3. Rehearsal Processing & Cancellation Policy

        After successful submission, our warehouse staff will complete the packing within 24 hours (excluding certain holidays).
If you have any questions about the parcel rehearsal, you may cancel the rehearsal before the product is taken off the shelf, and the ¥20 rehearsal fee will be fully refunded.
Once the product has been taken off the shelf, the rehearsal cannot be canceled.

    4. Submit the Parcel After Rehearsal

        After the parcel rehearsal is completed, you will receive a rehearsal completion notification.
        Kind reminder: If you actively cancel the parcel rehearsal, the paid rehearsal fee will not be refunded.

        At this point, you may click “Submit Parcel” and, if needed, reselect the packing method, packing details, and shipping route.

        ● If you reselect any of the above options, the parcel’s actual weight may differ from the rehearsal estimate, and the final shipping cost will be calculated based on the configuration at submission.
        ● If no changes are made, the estimated weight from the rehearsal will be used as the final parcel weight, and you only need to pay the estimated international shipping fee, with no additional charges required.

title: Transfer & Remittance Instructions
bodyHtml:
Dear users, to ensure your remittance is successfully credited, please carefully read the following instructions:

  1. RMB Remittance Restriction
    Oopbuy does not accept overseas RMB remittances. Bank settlements typically take 2-3 working days after the remittance to be credited. Please be patient.

  2. International Remittance Fees
    For international remittances, you will need to bear the following bank fees:

    • Hong Kong account remittance: 0.1% + 2.5 USD per transaction
    • Non-Hong Kong account remittance: 0.1% + 7 USD per transaction

    Oopbuy does not charge any service fees. The credited amount will be based on the actual amount received after deducting the bank fees. After completing your remittance, please check your email notifications to confirm the credited amount.

  3. Transfer Limitations
    Within a 24-hour period, each Oopbuy account can make a maximum of 5 transfers, and the amount of each transaction must exceed CNY 20. Submissions exceeding the transfer limit will automatically fail.

  4. Exchange Rate Conversion
    Regardless of the currency used for remittance, Oopbuy will credit your account in RMB after receiving and verifying the payment, based on the Oopbuy website exchange rate at the time of receipt.

  5. Exchange Loss Reminder
    To avoid potential exchange losses caused by currency conversion, please choose the appropriate currency for your remittance.

Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, feel free to contact our customer service team.

title: What is ‘Shopping Agent Service’? How does it work? How do you charge it?
bodyHtml:
Shopping Agent Service is our cord service. We purchase items from China to our customers based on customers’ wants and instructions. In addition, we provide services for the whole process from recommendation in purchasing, quality inspection, storage, delivery and after sales services to ensure our customers receive satisfied items. The better shopping experience will be gained by using our Shopping Agent service.

 

Through OOPBUY website, you can get what you want by making payments with local currency. The processes is shown as below:

1. Login to our website to search the items you would like us to purchase for you by providing items details. In this step, we will provide some related information, such as delivery or purchase tip/ recommendations, or even to assist you to find the better options.

2. Once the items have arrived to our warehouse, we will inspect the items quality for you and store them in our warehouse. You have up to 6 months free storage to store your items.

3. You could pick a suitable time for delivery and remind us to deliver your items to you. If you do not need those items immediately, we recommend you to stock more items and deliver them into one shipment in order to save delivery fee.

4. No matter whether the items are on its way or arrived to your place, our customer service will take responsibilities to assist you regarding to any after-sales issues.


0 service fee is our service philosophy. Customers just need to pay the items costs and delivery fee, no other additional service fee is added. However, it does not mean our service quality would be compromised. In contrast, our goal is to provide the best customer service in this field. Therefore, we welcome our customers to compare us with other service providers in the market in terms of service quality and charges

title: What is OOPBUY purchasing agent?
bodyHtml:
Purchasing on behalf of others is about finding someone to purchase the goods you need, perhaps because you cannot purchase these goods abroad, or because the price is higher than buying in China.

Purchasing goods from China and then shipping them abroad through express delivery is a common form of purchasing agency. At OOPBUY, you can search for products on major online shopping websites in China and make payments in your currency without the need for RMB. You can shop and ship directly in your currency. When you are abroad, you just need to move your finger and wait for the goods to be received, which is absolutely fast and convenient!

 


Why use OOPBUY as a purchasing agent?

1. Random purchase of online goods in Chinese Mainland;

2. You can shop here using pounds, dollars, euros, and various circulating currencies;

3. You can receive the overseas goods you purchased on your behalf within 7 working days at the earliest;

4. Worry free return and exchange system guarantee;

5. You can receive professional services from the OOPBUY customer service team to respond promptly to any problems you encounter during the shopping process.

 


When do I need to choose OOPBUY as a purchasing agent?

1. We are accustomed to using products or services from Chinese Mainland, and can entrust us to purchase them when they cannot be purchased abroad;

2. Professional learning materials, books (especially Chinese versions) or equipment. There is no channel to buy goods abroad, but the sales information can be found on Chinese Mainland websites;

3. Price advantage: because the labor force in Chinese Mainland is relatively cheap and the production cost is relatively lower, most of the goods are sold at much lower prices; Meanwhile, OOPBUY has designed a unique cost-effective shopping model for customers

4. Clothing size advantage: Foreign clothing sizes are generally larger and do not fit the body shape of Easterners, but on Chinese websites, you can buy styles that fit your eyes or clothing that suits your own size

5. Entrust to buy auction items on Chinese Mainland websites, such as auction and purchase of Taobao products.

title: Promotion Alliance Rules
bodyHtml:
I. Introduction Oopbuy Promotion Alliance is a nationwide referral program. Users can generate exclusive promotional links or posters to invite others to register and complete specific actions (such as placing an order, paying for shipping, or signing for the delivery) to earn commissions.
II. Participation Eligibility
[Basic Eligibility]
All registered users of the Oopbuy platform are eligible to participate.
[Compliance Requirements]
The use of false information, fake orders, or any form of cheating is prohibited. Violators will have their accounts frozen and all earnings canceled.
III. Promotion Process and Key Metrics
[Invitation Process]
Step 1: Generate Promotion Materials Log in to your Oopbuy account and navigate to the "Promotion Alliance" page to generate an exclusive promotional link or invitation poster.
Step 2: Invite Registration Share the link or poster to invite others to register.
  • Invited Users: Users who successfully register using your link/poster.
  • Order Users: Invited users who complete at least one order payment.
  • Sign Users: Users who complete an order and have signed for their package.

Step 3: Commission Trigger

  • First Order Commission: Once the invited user completes their first order payment, you will receive a commission of $5.
  • Order Commission: For every order payment completed by the invited user, you earn 1% of the order amount as commission.
  • Shipping Commission: After the invited user confirms package receipt, commission is settled based on 2% to 6% of the shipping fee (depending on the promoter's level).

If the invited user cancels the order, or if there is a return or refund, the corresponding commission will be retracted.

IV. Promoter Level Mechanism

[Level Division and Benefits]

Promotion Level Sign Users Order Bonus Shipping Bonus
V1 0-50 1% 2%
V2 50-100 1% 3%
V3 100-200 1% 4%
V4 200-300 1% 5%
V5 300+ 1% 6%
[Level Promotion Rules]
Automatic Update: The system will automatically upgrade your level in real time based on the total number of Sign Users you have invited.
V. Commission Rules
[Commission Composition]
  • First Order Commission = (Number of first order users) × $5
  • Order Commission = (Invited user’s order amount) × 1% (excluding shipping fees)
  • Shipping Commission = (Invited user’s shipping fee) × (corresponding level ratio from 2% to 6% for V1-V5)
[Settlement and Withdrawal]
  • Unsettled Commission: Generated after the order payment; can only be withdrawn once the package is signed for.
  • Settled Commission: After package receipt, the commission is automatically transferred to the withdrawable balance.
  • Withdrawal Rules:
    • Withdrawal Frequency: Twice per month.
    • Withdrawal Processing: Withdrawals will be processed within 1-3 working days after the application is submitted.
[Example Calculation]
Scenario: An invited user makes their first order payment (amounting to $100), submits a shipping order (amounting to $50) 5 days later, and signs for the package after 15 days.
V5 Promoter: Commission = First Order Commission + Order Commission + Shipping Commission = $5 + $100 × 1% + $50 × 6% = $9
VI. Violation Handling and Risk Control
[Cheating Behaviors]
Cheating behaviors, including but not limited to false registrations, fake orders, or multi-account operations, will result in all commissions being cleared and the account being banned upon verification.
[Data Risk Control]
Frequent registrations from the same IP address or device will be flagged as "suspicious users" and will not be included in the statistics.
[Appeal Mechanism]
If you have any disputes regarding your commission, you may submit an appeal within 7 days after package receipt. After 7 days, the commission is deemed confirmed.

title: If I want to buy food, liquid, electronic products, etc., would that be possible to ship?
bodyHtml: Don’t worry, as long as your items are legal, we will try our best to provide the best advice we can to you. Some special items might have different limitations due to the countries policy. Please contact our customer service team for more help.

title: I’m not familiar with Chinese products in terms of price and quality, would you able to help?
bodyHtml: Of course you can, simply tell us what you want. Our  ‘Experts Service’ team will help you to find good reputed sellers, greater quality similar items with lower price, etc.
